title: GEEZY Large Square Flower Pot – Durable Plastic, Lightweight for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Ideal Plant Tub for Garden Pots, 39x39x42 cm, Elegant Charcoal Design, Grey Lotus
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: This Large Grey Lotus Square Planter features a sophisticated charcoal grey color and textured stripe pattern, enhancing any space with a modern, stylish look. Perfect for adding a contemporary touch to your garden pots arrangement.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: Crafted from durable plastic, this Flower Pot is lightweight at just 1390 g. Its portability makes it an ideal choice for both indoor plant pots and outdoor plant pots, allowing easy rearrangement.

DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from high-quality plastic, this Plant Pot is built to withstand various weather conditions, making it perfect for outdoor garden pots. Its robust construction ensures longevity and reliability.

VERSATILE USE: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor settings, this planter is perfect for a variety of plants. Its 39x39x42 cm dimensions make it a great choice for larger plants, making it an excellent gift for gardening enthusiasts on any occasion.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 39 cm, Depth: 39 cm, Height: 42 cm / Package Dimensions: Height: 42 cm, Width: 39 cm, Depth: 39 cm / Package Weight: 1390 g / Material: Plastic / Color: Charcoal Grey
